title: sterculia dawei
intro: Sterculia dawei, a tree species belonging to the family Malvaceae, is a plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of Malaysia and Thailand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sterculia dawei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Sterculia dawei is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, and is traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
